title: rosa humilis var. lucida
intro: Rosa humilis var. lucida, also known as the fragrant wild rose, is a shrub native to North America with a strong, sweet fragrance and clusters of small, pink flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa humilis var. lucida include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Rosa humilis var. lucida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
